title: HOMESHOPA Plastic Airtight Food Storage Containers, 2 Pack 1100ml BPA Free Leakproof Stackable Reusable Lunch Boxes, Meal Prep Container for Kitchen & Pantry, Microwave Freezer Dishwasher Safe
features: SEAL IN THE FRESHNESS: Our airtight plastic food storage containers with lids are designed with a 4-sided lock mechanism and silicone lid locks, guaranteeing an airtight seal—perfect for storing both wet and dry foods worry-free. The flexibility of our food prep containers goes hand-in-hand with locking out air, ensuring your food stays fresh for longer periods. Effortlessly preserve, store, and transport your food items, knowing they'll stay deliciously fresh for an extended time.

PREMIUM MATERIAL: Our leakproof food containers are crafted from high-quality, BPA-free, and non-toxic food-grade plastic. This guarantees the freshness and taste of your stored contents while prioritising the health of both adults and children. Rest easy, knowing that our stackable containers provide a reliable and health-conscious solution, bringing an added layer of peace of mind to your family.

LEAKPROOF CONFIDENCE: Experience peace of mind with our leakproof meal prep containers. Engineered with precision, these plastic food storage containers for pantry and kitchen organisation keep your food secure and spill-free. Whether you're storing soups, sauces, or vibrant salads, trust in our leakproof design to preserve your culinary creations without the mess.

STACK AND GO: Our waterproof plastic lunch box features a smart, stackable, and multi-size design for easy organisation and storage. With a solid yet lightweight body, these food prep containers are designed for effortless transportation. Pack your favourite healthy snacks, a creamy vegetable salad, or sushi rice, lock it up securely, and carry it stress-free wherever you go. Enjoy the convenience of organised stacking and the freedom to take your meals on the move.

VERSATILE STORAGE SOLUTION: Embark on a culinary journey with a storage solution that caters to your every need. From marinating ingredients to preserving leftovers, these reusable freezer food containers with lids seamlessly transition from fridge to microwave to table. Experience the freedom to explore a world of culinary possibilities with our versatile storage solution at your fingertips.
WHAT YOU RECIEVED: You will get 2 Pack Rectangle Airtight Food Storage Containers with the Capacity of 1100ml/1.1 Litre.
